ItacAcademyItem.Name: Gesuiti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: One publication, not in British Library catalogue, is related to this Academy: Philosophia quadripartita seu Assertiones selectae ex logica physica, metaphysica, & morali, quas ex academia Veneta Societatis Jesu sub faustissimis auspiciis ... Georgi Cornelii ... publice propugnandas exhibet Joseph sementjus ...(Venetiis : ex typographia Hieronymi Albritii, 1693)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
